ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the game belongs to */,
  "console_id" INTEGER /* ID of the console the game was released on */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "rating_avg" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings the game has received */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments the game has received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the game entry was updated */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is featured on the platform */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's cover image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_console_id FOREIGN KEY ("console_id") REFERENCES consoles ("console_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consoles" (
  "console_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each console */,
  "console_name" TEXT /* Name of the console */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the console was released */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the console */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation of the console */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the console was released */,
  "popular_games" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of popular games for the console */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("console_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameplay_mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gameplay mechanic */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the gameplay mechanic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gameplay mechanic */,
  "parent_mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent mechanic (for hierarchical mechanics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is the primary genre of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mechanics" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gameplay mechanic */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mechanic is the primary mechanic of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the developer was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the developer's website */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the developer's headquarters */,
  "notable_games" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of notable games developed by the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "is_lead" INTEGER /* Indicates if the developer is the lead developer of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being contributed to */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., edit, comment) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
